chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Revision Application No.88 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection a/w reply as at A. 2. For order on CMA No.5140 of 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.5141 of 2024. 14.01.2026 Mr. M. Kamran Mirza, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ahmed Khan Khaskheli, AAG Sindh. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel after making submissions does not wish to press this revision application and seeks its withdrawal. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Asif
